title: Villager Fish Shop
description: Adds a small Villager Fish Shop to the beach biome
body:
This mod adds a small Villager Fish Shop to the beach, featuring a Fisherman villager inside.
![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19232218748440e677e37b3574b3a43e267ad986.jpeg)
The shop is decorated with cozy fish banners and contains some aquatic themed loot.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3cbe6063122cc2b04654a7756859932032dc229.jpeg)


The Villager Fish Shop can spawn in beach and snowy beach biomes.
![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c12f534384a4cc2e3652e161d90f085d5de7d4f.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
